name: Evan Baron
bubble_1_1: My current goal is to get in the field of artificial intelligence,
bubble_1_2: as it is what I deem to be our future.
bubble_1_3: For now, I couldn't get to learn it on my own since I currently do not have enough understanding of this domain.
bubble_2_1: If you want to learn more about me, just send me a message using the contact form below !
bubble_3_1: Born in the city Niort from France in 2006, I started learning programming at the age of 12. During all those years, I learnt multiple programming languages,
bubble_3_2: starting off with LUA, then learning Javascript, Typescript, Python and more recently Rust.
bubble_4_1: Outside of computer science, I have alot of other activities.
bubble_4_2: Rock climbing is the sport I practice the most, but I also go to the gym to get in shape.
bubble_5_1: I've looked at many fields in computer science,
bubble_5_2: from programming to algorithms and data structures, computer architecture, security, databases and even graphics.
bubble_6_1: I am currently a student at the high school Paul Guérin in Niort, in order to get the baccalaureate and continue my studies.
info: Hover on each bubble to learn about me !
thanks_2: I will read your message as soon as possible.
